Skip to contents
mixpower 1.2.0
  • Reference
  • Articles
  • Changelog

Package index

Core workflow

Specify a design, assumptions, and scenario, then estimate power.

mp_design()
Create a study design specification
mp_assumptions()
Create modeling assumptions for simulation-based power
mp_scenario()
Create a power-analysis scenario
mp_power()
Simulation-based power estimation (engine-agnostic core)
mp_quick_power()
Quick power run for a single LMM design

Model backends

Family- and engine-specific scenario/backend constructors.

mp_scenario_glmmtmb_lmm()
Gaussian LMM scenario using glmmTMB
mp_scenario_lme4()
Create a fully specified MixPower scenario with the lme4 backend
mp_scenario_lme4_binomial()
Create a fully specified MixPower scenario with the binomial lme4 backend
mp_scenario_lme4_nb()
Create a fully specified MixPower scenario with the NB lme4 backend
mp_scenario_lme4_poisson()
Create a fully specified MixPower scenario with the Poisson lme4 backend
mp_backend()
MixPower backend contract
mp_backend_glmmtmb()
Build a glmmTMB backend for Gaussian LMM scenarios
mp_backend_lme4()
Build an lme4 backend for MixPower scenarios
mp_backend_lme4_binomial()
Build an lme4 backend for binomial GLMM scenarios
mp_backend_lme4_nb()
Build an lme4 backend for Negative Binomial GLMM scenarios
mp_backend_lme4_poisson()
Build an lme4 backend for Poisson GLMM scenarios
validate_mp_backend()
Validate a MixPower backend

From a fitted pilot model

mp_from_fit()
Build a power scenario from a fitted lme4 model
mp_extend()
Scale a fitted-model scenario's sample size up or down

Credibility and validation

mp_plan()
Plan power the calibrate-first way
mp_calibrate()
Check the Type I error calibration of a scenario's test
mp_attach_calibration()
Record a calibration result on a scenario
mp_recommend_method()
Recommend an inference method for a scenario

Effect sizes

Elicitation, smallest-effect-of-interest, safeguard, and converters.

mp_elicit()
Elicit assumptions from standardized scientific quantities
mp_sesoi()
Set a smallest effect size of interest (SESOI) on a scenario
mp_safeguard_effect()
Safeguard (confidence-bound) effect size from a fitted model
mp_d_to_beta() mp_beta_to_d() mp_r2_to_beta() mp_beta_to_r2() mp_icc_to_sd() mp_sd_to_icc() mp_or_to_logodds() mp_logodds_to_or() mp_t_to_beta() mp_f_to_beta()
Effect-size converters for eliciting assumptions

Missing data and dropout

mp_missing()
Add a missing-data / dropout mechanism to a scenario

Planning and analysis flexibility

Sensitivity, power curves, sample-size solvers, model comparison.

mp_sensitivity()
Run power sensitivity analysis over a parameter grid
mp_power_curve()
Power curve for a single design/assumption parameter
mp_solve_sample_size()
Solve for minimum sample size achieving target power
mp_grid_sample_size()
Create a grid of values for sample-size search
mp_compare_models()
Compare analysis models on the same data: power and Type I error
mp_power_checkpoint()
Resumable, checkpointed power simulation
mp_power_adaptive()
Adaptive (sequential) power simulation
mp_stop()
Stopping rule for adaptive power simulation
mp_power_curve_parallel()
Parallel power curve evaluation
mp_sensitivity_parallel()
Parallel sensitivity analysis over a parameter grid
run_parallel()
Placeholder for parallel execution
plot(<mp_power_curve>)
Plot a power curve
plot(<mp_sensitivity>)
Plot a sensitivity analysis
autoplot(<mp_sensitivity>)
ggplot2 diagnostic plot for sensitivity or power curve

Reporting and reproducibility

mp_report()
Build a full "trust report" for a power analysis
mp_write_report()
Write a power-analysis report to a file
mp_report_table()
Publication-ready summary table for power results
mp_methods_text()
Generate a methods paragraph for a power analysis
plot(<mp_power>)
Plot the p-value distribution of a power analysis
as_tibble(<mp_power>)
Coerce mixpower results to a tibble
mp_manifest()
Reproducibility manifest for power analyses
mp_bundle_results()
Bundle results with manifest and optional labels
mp_write_results()
Write results or bundle to CSV or JSON

Lower-level and legacy helpers

mixpower-package mixpower
Simulation-Based Power Analysis for Mixed-Effects Models
mp_sensitivity_cell_run()
Run one sensitivity grid cell (for serial and parallel workers)
simulate_power()
Run a simple simulation-based power study
summarize_simulations()
Summarize simulation outputs
fit_model()
Fit a model for a single simulated dataset
test_effect()
Extract a test statistic for a model term
simulate_glmm_binomial_data()
Simulate binary outcome data for a GLMM with random effects
simulate_glmm_poisson_data()
Simulate count outcome data for a Poisson GLMM with random effects
simulate_glmm_nb_data()
Simulate count outcome data for a Negative Binomial GLMM with random effects
plot_power()
Plot power results

On this page

Developed by Alex Litovchenko.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
